product_overview: Mis Gastos es una aplicación web ligera para gestionar cuentas, categorías y transacciones personales en el navegador; funciona totalmente offline usando localStorage y no requiere autenticación.
core_goals: Permitir a los usuarios registrar y organizar ingresos y gastos por cuentas y categorías
Mostrar balances en tiempo real y mantener la integridad entre cuentas, categorías y transacciones
Persistir todos los datos localmente en el navegador (localStorage) para privacidad y uso sin servidor
Ofrecer una interfaz simple, rápida y accesible con navegación por pestañas
Proveer insights mensuales básicos (resumen, totales diarios, top gastos/ingresos)

features.name: Categorias Management
features.description: Crear, listar y eliminar categorías de ingreso/gasto directamente en la pestaña 'Categorías'.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> Fill in category name input with "Comida" -> Click "Agregar" button to add a category -> See new category "Comida" appear in the list -> See input field cleared
Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> Click "Agregar" button with empty name -> See validation error "El nombre es requerido" -> See no new category added
Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> See category "Comida" in the list -> Click "Eliminar" button on category "Comida" -> See category "Comida" removed from the list

features.name: Cuentas Management
features.description: Crear, listar y eliminar cuentas (Cuenta / Tarjeta de crédito) con balance inicial y visualización formateada.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> Fill in account name input with "Cuenta Nómina" -> Select account type "Cuenta" -> Fill in initial balance with "1000.00" -> Click "Agregar" button to add an account -> See new account "Cuenta Nómina" appear in the list with balance formatted "$1,000.00"
Navigate to / -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> Leave account name or balance empty -> Click "Agregar" button -> See validation error "Todos los campos son obligatorios" -> See no new account added

Navigate to / -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> See account "Cuenta Nómina" in the list -> Click "Eliminar" button on account "Cuenta Nómina" -> See account removed from the accounts list -> See transactions that referenced the account show "Cuenta eliminada" where applicable

features.name: Transacciones Management
features.description: Registrar y eliminar transacciones de ingreso o gasto vinculadas a una cuenta y opcionalmente a una categoría; actualizará el balance de la cuenta.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> Fill in transaction description with "Compra café" -> Select transaction type "gasto" -> Enter transaction amount "35.50" -> Select a category from dropdown "Comida" -> Select an account from dropdown "Cuenta Nómina" -> Pick a date "2026-02-21" -> Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction -> See transaction "Compra café" appear in the list -> See account "Cuenta Nómina" balance decreased by 35.50
Navigate to / -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> Enter transaction amount "0.00" -> Click "Agregar" button -> See validation error "El monto debe ser al menos 0.01" -> See no new transaction added

Navigate to / -> Click on "Transacciones" tab when no accounts exist -> See message "Primero agrega una cuenta en la pestaña Cuentas" -> See transaction form hidden -> See no option to add transaction

Navigate to / -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> See existing transaction "Compra café" in the list -> Click "Eliminar" button on that transaction -> See transaction removed from the list -> See account "Cuenta Nómina" balance updated to reverse the transaction

features.name: Insights
features.description: Ver resumen mensual, totales diarios (gráfico) y listas de top gastos e ingresos para el mes seleccionado.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on "Insights" tab -> Select a year from dropdown "2026" -> Select a month from dropdown "Febrero" -> See monthly summary showing total income, total expenses and balance -> See daily totals bar chart rendered -> See top expenses list -> See top income list

Navigate to / -> Click on "Insights" tab -> Select a month/year with no transactions -> See empty state message "No hay transacciones para este mes" -> See charts and top lists show empty states or placeholders

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Cambiar el tema entre modo claro y oscuro mediante el botón de la cabecera; la preferencia se persiste en localStorage.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header -> App switches to dark mode -> See UI update to dark styles -> Refresh the page -> Navigate to / -> See app remains in dark mode (preference persisted)

Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header when localStorage is unavailable -> See warning message "Preferencia no pudo guardarse" -> See theme change may apply temporarily but not persist after refresh

features.name: Tab Navigation (Navigation & UI)
features.description: Navegación por pestañas entre Categorías, Cuentas, Transacciones e Insights con indicador de pestaña activa y un solo panel visible.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See default active tab "Categorias" -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> See "Cuentas" panel become visible -> See "Cuentas" tab styled as active -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> See "Transacciones" panel become visible and only one panel visible at a time
Open the app with JavaScript disabled -> Navigate to / -> See message indicating JavaScript is required -> See tabs not functional

features.name: Data Persistence (localStorage Integration)
features.description: Guardar y restaurar categorías, cuentas y transacciones en localStorage con claves dedicadas para persistencia entre sesiones.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> Add category "Comida" -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> Add account "Cuenta Nómina" with balance "1000.00" -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> Add transaction "Compra café" gasto 35.50 -> Refresh the page -> Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> See category "Comida" present -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> See account "Cuenta Nómina" present with updated balance -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> See transaction "Compra café" present

Navigate to / -> Manually clear browser localStorage or site data -> Refresh the page -> Navigate to / -> Click on "Categorias" tab -> See empty state message for categories -> Click on "Cuentas" tab -> See empty state message for accounts -> Click on "Transacciones" tab -> See message "Primero agrega una cuenta en la pestaña Cuentas"

routes.description: Single-page app with tab-based navigation (Categorias, Cuentas, Transacciones, Insights)

features.name: Categorias Management
user_interactions: Click "Agregar" button to add a category
See new category appear in the list
Click "Eliminar" button on a category to delete it

features.name: Cuentas Management
features.description: Create and delete bank accounts or credit cards with initial balance
user_interactions: Select account type (Cuenta or Tarjeta de crédito)
Click "Agregar" button to add an account
See new account appear in the list with balance
Click "Eliminar" button to delete an account

features.name: Transacciones Management
features.description: Create and delete income/expense transactions linked to categories and accounts
user_interactions: Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction
Click "Eliminar" button to delete a transaction

features.name: Insights
features.description: View monthly summary, daily totals chart, top expenses and top income for a selected month
user_interactions: Select a year and month from dropdowns
See monthly summary (total income, total expenses, balance)

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Switch between light and dark mode
user_interactions: Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header
App switches between dark and light mode

known_limitations.issue: No backend or remote API; all data is stored in localStorage only
known_limitations.impact: Data is not synced across devices or persisted beyond browser storage
All data is shared for any user on the same browser
